label: Location quality for guests
description: What to consider: connection to public transport; vicinity to city centre; vicinity to landmarks; offering of restaurants/bars/supermarkets nearby.

label: Neighbourhood narrative (3-5 sentences)
description: Can be AI pre-filled from the address, then PM confirms/edits.

label: Is there parking at the property?
description: Gate: when "None", all parking sub-questions collapse.

label: Nearby parking options
description: AI-generated from the address; PM validates/regenerates.

label: Building state
description: What to look at: facade condition; entrance/lobby cleanliness; visible damage or wear; lighting; signs of disrepair.

label: Is there an elevator?
description: Gate: when "No", elevator sub-questions collapse.

label: Elevator condition
description: What to look at: cleanliness, lighting, signs of wear/faults, smoothness of operation.

label: Check-in step name
description: Free-text per step; repeatable — all per-step fields below repeat for each step.

label: Check-in complexity overall
description: What to weigh: number of access steps; number of locks/codes; whether a human handover is needed; signage clarity; distance from entrance to unit.

label: Luggage storage on-site?
description: Gate: when "No", storage sub-questions collapse.

label: Is there a designated trash area?
description: Gate for the trash block.

label: Guest trash instructions (how guests dispose of trash)
description: Always asked — guests need disposal guidance regardless of an on-site container.

label: Is there a central/building fuse box?
description: Gate (building-level). The same question repeats per unit (see Unit safety).

label: Is there central/building fire safety?
description: Gate (building-level): central extinguishers, marked exits, detectors. Repeats per unit.

label: Laundry setup
description: Gate: delivery frequency shows unless "Not yet set up".

label: Wi-Fi available?
description: Gate: when "No", WiFi sub-questions collapse.

label: Unit number / location (e.g. links · rechts · Mitte)
Apartment category
description: Tiers anchored on finish quality, furnishing completeness, size and amenities — validate definitions with GX.

label: Is there a balcony?
description: Gate: when "No", balcony count collapses.

label: Noise heard with windows closed?
description: Gate: noise source shows unless "No".

label: Furnished to Arbio standard?
description: Arbio standard: required furniture set (bed, seating, dining, storage), condition/quality, completeness vs the checklist — validate with GX.

label: Equipment status
description: Against the equipment checklist: kitchen equipment completeness, appliances working, essentials present.

label: Bathroom condition
description: What excellent means: cleanliness; fixtures working; sealing/grout intact; ventilation; no mold or leaks.

label: Any issues found in the unit?
description: Gate for the unified issue log.

label: Issue / item name
description: Repeat the block per issue.

label: Any appliances/amenities to log?
description: Gate for the item log (separate from the issue log).

label: Item name
description: Repeat per item in the unit.

label: Is there a fuse box in the unit?
description: Gate (unit-level), mirrors the building question.

label: Fire extinguisher present in unit?
description: Gate: when "No", extinguisher sub-questions collapse.

label: Fire extinguisher last service date visible?
Smoke detector(s) present?
description: Gate: when "No", smoke-detector sub-questions collapse.

label: Smoke detector functioning (test)
description: Press the test button until it beeps so results are consistent.

label: Carbon monoxide detector present?
description: Gate: when "No", CO-detector sub-questions collapse.

label: Carbon monoxide detector functioning (test)
description: Use the test button; confirm the alarm sounds.

label: First-aid kit present?
description: Gate: when "No", first-aid sub-questions collapse.

label: Ceiling height (meters)
description: Kept where relevant to curtain/blind measurement.

label: Overall readiness for go-live
description: Ready = no open issues; Conditional = minor issues with owner actions; Not ready = blocking issues open.

label: Recommended host-start date
description: The host-start date is set from this assessment (no predefined go-live date in the new process).

label: Health score (1-10)
description: Composite of condition, completeness, and open-issue count/severity. 10 = move-in ready, 1 = major work needed.
